general.name: Adamant Will
general.description: This passive ability grants you an additional 20/40/?/?% chance to resist charm, and 15/30/?/?% chance to resist mesmerization spells. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Alchemy Mastery
general.description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Alchemy recipes by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Baking Mastery
general.description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Baking recipes by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Blacksmithing Mastery
general.description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Blacksmithing recipes by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Brewing Mastery
general.description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Brewing recipes by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Circular Breathing
general.description: This passive ability increases your endurance regeneration by 1/2/3/4 point(s). Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Combat Agility
general.description: This passive ability increases your melee avoidance by 2%/5%/10%. Melee avoidance is the component of armor class that allows you to avoid incoming attacks and is derived from agility, item avoidance, and your defense skill. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Combat Fury
general.description: This passive ability increases your chance of performing a critical melee hit with all skills by 1/?/5/10%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Combat Stability
general.description: This passive ability increases the armor class soft cap of your class by 2/5/?%. The armor class soft cap is the amount of armor class that functions at 100% effectiveness. Armor class gains in excess of this cap are reduced in effectiveness by a percentage based on your class and level.

general.name: Crafting Mastery
general.description: Training with the sages and merchants of Norrath gives adventurers the chance to hone their crafting skills. This passive ability allows you to raise 1/2/3/4/5/6 additional standard tradeskill (Baking, Blacksmithing, Brewing, Fletching, Jewelcraft, Pottery, or Tailoring) from its initial Specialization cap of 200 up to 300. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Fear Resistance
general.description: This passive ability grants you an additional 25/50/75/100% chance to resist most fear spells and increases the chance of breaking fear earlier. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: First Aid
general.description: This passive ability increases the maximum health you can bind wound to 80/90/100/100/100/100% and increases the amount of healing provided by a single bandage by 0/0/0/10/25/50%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Fletching Mastery
general.description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Fletching recipes by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Foraging
general.description: This passive ability increases your Forage skill cap by 50 points. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Gather Party
general.description: Ability Activation ID: 5 - Refresh Time: 6:00:00 - Ability Timer(s): 99. This ability, when activated, will give everyone in your party the option of teleporting directly to your location. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Innate Eminence
general.description: This passive ability increases your strength, stamina, agility, dexterity, wisdom, intelligence, and charisma by 2/4/6/?/? points. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Innate Lung Capacity
general.description: This passive ability increases the amount of air you can hold in your lungs by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Innate Metabolism
general.description: This passive ability reduces your food and drink consumption by 110/125/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Innate Regeneration
general.description: This passive ability increases your health regeneration by 1/2/3/4/5/?/? point(s). Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Innate Spell Resistance
general.description: This passive ability improves your cold, disease, fire, magic, and poison resistances by 2/?/?/?/? points. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Jewel Craft Mastery
general.description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Jewelcrafting recipes by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Natural Durability
general.description: This passive ability increases your maximum base health (derived from your stamina) by 2/5/10/12%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Origin
general.description: Ability Activation ID: 331 - Refresh Time: 0:18:00 - Ability Timer(s): 20. This ability, when activated, transports you back to your starting city. You can check your origin location using the command /charinfo. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Packrat
general.description: This passive ability reduces the weight of all equipped and carried items by 5/?/?/?/?/?/?/?/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Permanent Illusion
general.description: This passive ability extends the duration of your beneficial illusion spells to 16.6 hours and allows them to persist when zoning. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Pottery Mastery
general.description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Pottery recipes by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Quick Buff
general.description: Ability Activation ID: 4 - Refresh Time: 0:10:00 - Ability Timer(s): 98. This ability, when activated, will cast all currently memorized beneficial spells on all valid group and raid targets in range, for full mana and reagent cost. NOTE: This ability will continue casting spells even if you have no mana left.

general.name: Steadfast Will
general.description: This passive ability grants you a 15/30/50/60/70/80/90/100% chance to endure what would otherwise be a stunning melee attack, from any angle, without being stunned. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Stoicism
general.description: This passive ability reduces how far incoming melee attacks push you backward by 10%. Requirements: level 1.

general.name: Tailoring Mastery
general.description: This passive ability reduces the chance of failing Tailoring recipes by 10/?/?%. Requirements: level 1. }

archetype.name: Acrobatics
archetype.description: This passive ability reduces the damage that you take from falling by increasing the effectiveness of your safe fall skill by 10/20/30%. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Ambidexterity
archetype.description: This passive ability increases your chance to successfully dual wield by 32%. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Burst of Power
archetype.description: This passive ability increases your flurry chance (up to two extra attacks after a primary slot triple attack) by 7/11/?%. Requirements: level 46.

archetype.name: Companion's Discipline
archetype.description: This passive ability allows you to give your pet advanced commands. Hotkeys for these commands can be created using the pet control window. Hold and Greater Hold - /pet hold -or- /pet ghold. When your pet is in the hold state, your pet will only attack something when you tell it to, and your pet will continue to attack anything on its hate list after that point. Once the encounter is finished, your pet will automatically go back to a held state. If your pet is never told to exclusively attack anything, your pet will never attack anything, even if something is attacking it. The greater hold state forces your pet to not add anything to its hatelist unless specifically added by you. You can add a target to your pet's hatelist with either /pet attack or /pet qattack. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Critical Affliction
archetype.description: This passive ability increases the chance your damage-over-time spells will deal critical damage at each 6 second interval they are active by 3/6/9%. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Destructive Cascade
archetype.description: This passive ability increases the damage dealt by your critical damage over time spells by 125/150/175%. Requires Critical Affliction rank 1/2/3. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Destructive Fury
archetype.description: This passive ability increases the damage dealt by your critical direct damage spells by 30/60/100%. Requirements: level 1, Fury of Magic at level 1.

archetype.name: Double Riposte
archetype.description: This passive ability grants you a 5%/10%/15% chance to perform a double riposte. Requirements: level 15.

archetype.name: Exodus
archetype.description: Ability Activation ID: 43 - Refresh Time: 1:12:00 - Ability Timer(s): 3. This ability, when activated, teleports all group members within a 100 foot radius to a relatively safe location in your current zone with a 0.1 second cast time. Requirements: level 10.

archetype.name: Finishing Blow
archetype.description: This passive ability grants your critical melee attacks a 100% chance to deal 100/200/300% damage to level 50/53/55 and lower NPC targets with 10/12/15% or less health. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Fury of Magic
archetype.description: This passive ability increases your chance to land a critical hit with your direct damage spells by 2%. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Healing Adept
archetype.description: This passive ability increases the effectiveness of your instant-duration healing spells by 2%. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Healing Boon
archetype.description: This passive ability increased chance that your heal-over-time spells will exceptionally heal their target by 3/6/9%. An exceptional heal does double healing value of the spell for that 6 second interval. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Healing Gift
archetype.description: This passive ability grants your instant-duration healing spells a 3%/6%/10% chance to score an exceptional heal. An exceptional heal doubles the healing value of the spell. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Improved Bash
archetype.description: This passive ability allows you to use your bash skill while wielding a two-handed weapon. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Innate Camouflage
archetype.description: Ability Activation ID: 80 - Refresh Time: 0:00:07 - Ability Timer(s): 2. This ability, when activated, grants you standard invisibility for up to 20 minutes. Requirements: level 40.

archetype.name: Innate Invis to Undead
archetype.description: Ability Activation ID: 37 - Refresh Time: 0:00:07 - Ability Timer(s): 53. This ability, when activated, renders you invisible to most undead creatures for up to 27 minutes. Requirements: level 40.

archetype.name: Intimidation
archetype.description: This passive ability causes successful uses of your intimidate skill to trigger Intimidation I which causes a level 70 or lower target to run away in fear for 0:00:18. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Mass Group Buff
archetype.description: Ability Activation ID: 35 - Refresh Time: 1:12:00 - Ability Timer(s): 1. This ability, when activated, doubles the mana cost of your next spell or ability that can be affected by the Mass Group Buff and causes it to land on all allies within the spell's radius. Requirements: level 50.

archetype.name: Master of All
archetype.description: This passive ability allows you to you gain a second specialization. Specialized schools of magic benefit from a from a reduction in mana cost and fizzle chance. After acquiring this ability, the next specialization to go over its current cap becomes your second specialization. Requirements: level 20.

archetype.name: Mastery of the Past
archetype.description: This passive ability makes it impossible for you to fizzle level 20/40/52 or lower spells. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Mend Companion
archetype.description: Ability Activation ID: 58 - Refresh Time: 0:10:00 - Ability Timer(s): 2. Mend Companion I, when activated, instantly heals your pet for 5000 health. Requirements: level 39.

archetype.name: Mental Clarity
archetype.description: This passive ability increases your mana regeneration by 1 point. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Mnemonic Retention
archetype.description: This passive ability increases the capacity of your spell casting window allowing you to memorize 1/2/3/4/5/6 additional spell. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Persistent Casting
archetype.description: This passive ability grants you a 11% chance (per rank) to regain your concentration and complete a spell cast when stunned. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Pet Affinity
archetype.description: Allows your pet to benefit from group beneficial spells and songs. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Physical Enhancement
archetype.description: This passive ability increases your melee avoidance by 2% and your armor class soft cap by 2%. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Quick Damage
archetype.description: This passive ability reduces the base cast time of direct damage spells that have an initial cast time of 3 seconds or more by 2/5/10%. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Rampage
archetype.description: Ability Activation ID: 109 - Refresh Time: 0:10:00 - Ability Timer(s): 81. This ability, when activated, performs a single primary slot combat round on all creatures within a 40 foot radius. Requirements: level 30.

archetype.name: Spell Casting Deftness
archetype.description: This passive ability reduces the cast time of beneficial spells that have a duration and an initial cast time of at least 3 seconds by 10%. Requirements: level 1. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Spell Casting Mastery
archetype.description: This passive ability reduces the mana cost of all spells by 2/5/10%. Req level 1.

archetype.name: Spell Casting Reinforcement
archetype.description: This passive ability increases the duration of beneficial spells that you cast by 5/15/30/50%. Spells that grant invulnerability and combat abilities are exempt from this extension. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Spell Casting Subtlety
archetype.description: Ability Activation ID: 25 - Refresh Time: 0:00:01 - Ability Timer(s): 0. This ability is DISABLED. Purchase the 0 cost rank to enable its effects. When enabled, this passive ability reduces the amount of hate generated by your attacks and spells by 5/?/?/?/?/?%. Requirements: level 1.

archetype.name: Thief's Intuition
archetype.description: This passive ability reduces the reuse time of your Sense Traps and Disarm Traps skills by 1 second. Requirements: level 1. }

special.name: Banestrike
special.description: This passive ability improves the base damage of your melee attacks and the power of your damaging and healing abilities by 2/4/?/?%. Complete Slayer achievements to progress this ability. Requirements: level 1. }
